title: Libraries Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated libraries family schema. Document library declarations from Contract §14.1 (12 standard libraries: 8 MVP/Required, 3 Optional/Future, plus 99_Archive), sync-policy enum (§14.2), folder-permissions policy (§14.5), governed sync elevation exception (§14.5A), archive/read-only behavior (§3.2 + §5.6), and vertical seeding keyed on ProjectType (VR-08). Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/libraries.fields.json. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24). No-full-Procore-mirror posture preserved (VR-16, Contract P-10): libraries do not host Procore binary mirrors, Procore document-sync, or canonical Procore document objects.

libraryInternalName.description: Internal library name (e.g., 01_Project_Administration). 12 standard libraries from §14.1.

libraryDisplayName.description: Display version of the library name.

primaryModule.description: Module that primarily owns this library.

defaultAccess.description: Default access posture (e.g., 'Project Team Member+', 'PM, PA, Admin').

restrictedAccess.description: Restricted-access posture (e.g., 'Read for Executive Oversight'). Optional.

recommendedMetadata.description: Recommended metadata columns (e.g., DocCategory, DocStatus, ResponsibleRole).

validationRule.description: Validation rule string from §14.1 (e.g., 'Must exist', 'Validate if module enabled').

folderPermissionsPolicy.description: Unique folder-level permissions are prohibited except in controlled exceptions. §14.5; VR-17.

governedSyncException.description: Whether the library is elevated from Shortcut Allowed to Sync Allowed via governed exception. §14.5A.

readOnlyOnStatus.description: Library flips read-only when ProjectStatus is Closed or Archived. §3.2, §5.6; VR-09, VR-29. Archived is ProjectStatus only — never ProjectStage.

seedRule.description: Vertical seeding rule keyed on ProjectType. VR-08. Vertical seeding never keys on ProjectStage.

perType.description: Per-ProjectType seeding directives. Keys are the 5 canonical ProjectType values.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.
